ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used */,
  "data_dir" TEXT /* Directory containing the dataset */,
  "data_range" TEXT /* Range of data used for the experiment */,
  "val_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of data used for validation */,
  "test_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of data used for testing */,
  "feature" TEXT /* Type of feature used (e.g., raw, processed) */,
  "mechanism_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mechanism used */,
  "x_eps" REAL /* Value of x epsilon */,
  "y_eps" REAL /* Value of y epsilon */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model used */,
  "hidden_dim" INTEGER /* Number of hidden dimensions */,
  "dropout" REAL /* Dropout rate */,
  "forward_correction" INTEGER /* Whether forward correction is used */,
  "optimizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the optimizer used */,
  "max_epochs" INTEGER /* Maximum number of epochs */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate */,
  "weight_decay" REAL /* Weight decay */,
  "patience" INTEGER /* Patience for early stopping */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for training (e.g., CPU, GPU) */,
  "seed" INTEGER /* Random seed used for the experiment */,
  "repeats" INTEGER /* Number of repeats */,
  "output_dir" TEXT /* Directory containing the output */,
  "log" INTEGER /* Whether logging is enabled */,
  "log_mode" TEXT /* Mode of logging (e.g., individual, batch) */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "cmd" TEXT /* Command-line arguments used to launch the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the experiment */,
  "collaborator_ids" TEXT /* IDs of other researchers collaborating on the experiment */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for organizing and filtering experiments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_mechanism_id FOREIGN KEY ("mechanism_id") REFERENCES mechanisms ("mechanism_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_optimizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("optimizer_id") REFERENCES optimizers ("optimizer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset (e.g., music, image, text) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, Parquet) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "preprocessing_steps" TEXT /* Preprocessing steps applied to the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the model */,
  "parameters" INTEGER /* Number of parameters in the model */,
  "paper_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the paper describing the model */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Deep learning framework used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mechanisms" (
  "mechanism_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mechanism */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the mechanism */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mechanism */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the mechanism */,
  "paper_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the paper describing the mechanism */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mechanism_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "optimizers" (
  "optimizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimizer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the optimizer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the optimizer */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the optimizer */,
  "paper_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the paper describing the optimizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("optimizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment that generated this result */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, loss) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch at which the result was recorded */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used during training */,
  "training_time" TEXT /* Time taken for training */,
  "test_time" TEXT /* Time taken for testing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
column_names: Range of data used for the experiment
Ratio of data used for validation
Ratio of data used for testing
Type of feature used (e.g., raw, processed)
Device used for training (e.g., CPU, GPU)
Random seed used for the experiment
